raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta Walstiha un ta Waldischana/ un wiſſa Walsti-
hu Angſtiba appakſch wiſſahm Debbeſim/ taps ta Wiſfu-aug-
staka ſwehteem Laudim dohta/ kurra Walstiba buhsweena muh-
schiga Walstiba/ un wiſſi War-
renee winnam kalpohs/un paklau-
tihs tam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas bija tahs Wullodas Gals. Bet es Danijsß tappu
no mannahm Dohnaschanahm
iſtruhzinahts/ un mans Eihmis
fakritte/ un es paturreju tohs
Wahrdus manna Strdi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta VIII. Nodalla.
Danijsß reds pee ta Uhdens Ulāi weenu Anna
ar diwi Raggeem : r. Un weenu Ahſi : r.
Kastam pirmajam Annam winna Raggus ja-
lansa : 7. Kurru Parahdischunu tas Enge-
lis Gabrijels iſſiahsta no teem Karrecni/
ſtarp teem Persereem un Greckereem : 15/
20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Reschā Gaddā ta Rey-
Suixa Belsazera Walsti-
bas/ rahdijahs man wee-
na Parahdischana/ mun Dan-
jelam/ pehz to/ kad man ta pir-
ma bij parahdijfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es redſeju kabda Pa-
rabdischana/ (ta notikke man/
kad es Sushana Wilſi biju/ eekſch
tahs Walsts Elam/) un es redſe-
u to Parahdischunu/ kad es pee
tahs Uppes Utāi biju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es pazehlu fatwas Az-
ts/ un ſkattijohs / un rangi/
weena Anns ſtahweja preeſſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tahs Uppes/ kam bij diwi Rag-
gi/ un tee diwi Raggī btja augſti/
un weens btja angſtaks nekā
ohtrs/ un tas angſtaks uſlehze
pehdigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es redſeju/ ka tas Anns
ar fanveem Raggeem prett Wak-
kara-Puffi baddija / un prett
Seimeta-Puffi/ un prett Dec-
nas-Biddus Puffi/ un nekahdi
Swehri warreja prett winnu
vaſtahweht/ un neweens bija/
tas no winna Rohkas atpeſtija/
bet wiſsch darrija/tas tam patike-
ke/ un pa-angſtinajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad es us to dohnaju/
raugi/ tad nahze weens Ahſis no
Wakkara-Puffes pahr wiſſu
Semmi/ un ne aiskahre to Seim-
mi/ un tam Ahſcham btj slaists
Rags ſtarp winna Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas nahze pee ta Anns
ar teem diwi Raggeem / fo es
biju redſejs preeſſch Uppes ſtah-
wain / un tas lauſahs prett
winnu ar ſtipru Bahrsbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es redſeju/ ka tas tuwi-
pee ta Anns nahze/ un apſkat-
tahs prett winnu / un baddija
to Annu/ un falauſija winna
diwi Raggus/ un tam Annam
ne bij ne kahds Spehks winna
Breeſcha paſtahweht/ un winſch
mette to pee Semmes/ un ta-
minne to/ un neweens bija/ kas
to Annu warreja no winna
Rohkas igslanbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Ahſis pa-angſtina-
jahs tohti / bet kad winſch bija
ſiprs tappis / tad falubſe tas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
